arts.ttl: Team News: Bournemouth vs. Southampton injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Monday's Premier League clash between Bournemouth and Southampton.

arts.ttl: Southampton eyeing former Chelsea manager as Russell Martin replacement?
arts.sum: Southampton are reportedly eyeing up Graham Potter as a potential replacement for head coach Russell Martin as the Saints struggle to adapt to the top flight.
